name: Imran
aboutPara1: Hi, I'm Alex Smith — a passionate photographer, web designer, and developer based in New York. I love creating beautiful digital experiences and capturing moments through my lens.
aboutPara2: With over 5 years of experience, I specialize in building responsive websites, crafting stunning visuals, and delivering high-quality freelance work for clients worldwide.

services.title: Photography
services.desc: Professional photography for events, portraits, and commercial projects.

services.title: Web Development
services.desc: Modern, responsive websites built with the latest technologies.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.desc: Clean and intuitive designs that enhance user experience.

services.title: App Development
services.desc: Cross-platform mobile applications tailored to your needs.
